notes: W3 config-snapshot regression batch (13 service-config fields collapsed to shared_ptr snapshot, all dispatch paths + behavior-neutral comment cleanup). notion.com/chat opened in logged-in tab (redirect -> notion.so/chat), hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R). UNLIKE #1233, the Notion AI chat UI fully HYDRATED this run: sidebar + 'AI에게 질문하기' header + composer all rendered, composer focused. Typed PII prompt (value confirmed via DOM = '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567'), clicked submit ('AI 메시지 제출하기'). Submit ACCEPTED by backend: URL advanced to notion.so/chat?t=3669aa2d8bdd8060932100a922c27c87&wfv=chat (thread record created) and composer cleared. Waited full 120s+ (submit 16:43 -> final scan 16:46). Conversation area stayed COMPLETELY BLANK across all checks (30s/75s/120s): no user message bubble, no AI/engine response, no '차단' warning text anywhere in rendered DOM/interactive-element list, header still showing 'AI에게 질문하기' placeholder. Classic notion record-map injection failure family (#1139/#1148/#1165/#1183/#1184/#1212/#1233): message reaches backend thread but transcript never populates DOM, so engine intercept on runInferenceTranscript is not surfaced to the user. NOT a true PASS->FAIL regression — baseline was already FAIL_NOT_RENDERED, so W3 (config-snapshot collapse + comment cleanup) introduces NO observable regression on notion. This run reached FURTHER than #1233 (composer hydrated + submit accepted + thread created vs #1233 composer never rendering), confirming the #1233 degradation was a transient FE hydration stall, not an engine effect. character/m365 (WS dispatch via snapshot ws_envelope_type) remain the highest-signal W3 validators.
